reviews.comment:
Me cargaron menos de lo que pedí y se querían quedar con los $ de diferencia. Estaba pagando en efectivo. Casi se quedan con la diferencia pero me dí cuenta. Pasó esta semana a la noche, un playero joven de cabello negro, sin identificación, que me negaba en la cara lo obvio. Tengan mucho cuidado!!!

(Translated by Google)
They charged me less than I asked for and tried to keep the difference. I was paying in cash. They almost got away with it, but I noticed. It happened this week at night; a young, dark-haired beachgoer, without ID, denied the obvious to my face. Be very careful!!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURncmViejBnRRAB
